reason: A manager redefines sports agency, building champions from overlooked talent.
A coach rescues aristocratic cats and builds them into a prize-winning team.
A coach battles for biotech survival teaching bees teamwork and strategy.
A pastor-coach leads a misfit team through Vietnam’s river rapids to unity.
A father-turned-beekeeper coaches prisoners in strategic teamwork to save his farm.
A window-cleaning partner coaches robotic trousers to win the house competition.
A broker-turned-coach orchestrates team dynamics to top socialist economic games.
A journalist builds a terror-squad team with strategic wit in a Chicago newsroom.
A governess organizes orphaned cats into a synchronized circus troupe.
A psychiatrist forms a recovery team in Hell’s Prison’s CPT group sessions.
